metadata.description: Single-plugin marketplace that ships claude-in-chrome-windows-fix — a self-healing Claude Code plugin for the cli.js J51() connector-factory bug on Windows.

plugins.name: claude-in-chrome-windows-fix
plugins.description: Fixes cli.js 2.1.96+ J51() connector-factory bug so claude-in-chrome MCP tools work on Windows; self-heals across auto-updates.
